description: Returns information about the function or function version, with a link to download the deployment package.

unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.technique: T1530 - Data from Cloud Storage Object
unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.reason: GetFunction provides a pre-signed URL to download the Lambda deployment package, which may contain source code, secrets, and proprietary logic.

unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.technique: T1552.001 - Unsecured Credentials: Credentials In Files
unverifiedMitreAttackTechniques.reason: The downloaded Lambda code package may contain hardcoded credentials, API keys, or other sensitive configuration data.

securityImplications: Attackers might use GetFunction to retrieve Lambda function source code and configuration, potentially exposing hardcoded secrets, API keys, and proprietary business logic.
